name: libhtml-wikiconverter-kwiki-perl
title: libhtml-wikiconverter-kwiki-perl
summary: HTML to wiki markup converter - Kwiki dialect
description:
HTML to wiki markup converter - Kwiki dialect
HTML::WikiConverter is an HTML to wiki converter. It can convert HTML
source into a variety of wiki markups, called wiki "dialects".
.
HTML::WikiConverter::Kwiki provides the Kwiki dialect.
